pi_items.source: setup_task.sh script downloads the fallback to this path and sets it as INSULIN_GB.
setup_task.sh script dynamically generates primers and writes to this exact path.
task instructions and export_result.sh which looks for amplicon.fasta in /home/ga/UGENE_Data/pcr_results.
task instructions and export_result.sh which looks for insulin_pcr_annotated.gb in /home/ga/UGENE_Data/pcr_results.
task instructions and export_result.sh which looks for pcr_validation_report.txt in /home/ga/UGENE_Data/pcr_results.
setup_task.sh script saves the ground truth primers and sequence information to this path.

privileged_info_summary: Verified that the task uses real human insulin gene data (GenBank NM_000207.3) downloaded dynamically from NCBI, with synthetically generated primer sequences. The expected output paths for the fasta, annotated genbank file, and the validation report exactly match the agent instructions and the export/verifier scripts.
